name: Citrus Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 5 cups soft, cubed French bread (3/4-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together milk, egg substitute, sugar, vanilla, orange and lemon peels, and cinnamon.
2. Stir in the bread cubes and prunes until combined.
3. Let the mixture stand at room temperature for 45 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Stir in the melted margarine into the bread mixture.
6. Spoon the mixture into an 8-inch square baking dish coated with vegetable cooking spray.
7. Bake for 45 minutes, or until a pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature with warm Citrus Sauce.
NOTES: This recipe makes 6 servings, with each serving containing approximately 282 calories.
